author_identification.canonical_name_ar: عبد الرحمن بن يحيى المُعَلِّمي اليماني
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent scholar in hadith and usul al-fiqh, known for his critical editions and methodological rigor.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A collection of advanced insights and discussions in usul al-fiqh, reflecting the author's deep engagement with the field.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of the collected works of al-Mu'allimi, showcasing his contributions to Islamic legal theory.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Ali bin Muhammad al-Umaran and Nabil bin Nassar al-Sindi are known for their meticulous editorial work in Islamic texts.
